message:
feat(utf8): add safe chunked UTF-8 validator for streaming pane output (ft-2oph2)

Tracks incomplete code points across chunk boundaries using std::str::from_utf8
(SIMD-accelerated by the standard library). 19 unit tests + 10 proptests
covering cross-boundary splits, accumulation, and mixed valid/invalid input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
